nasb.text: And at the end of four hundred and thirty years, to the very day, all the hosts of the Lord went out from the land of Egypt.

esv.text: At the end of 430 years, on that very day, all the hosts of the Lord went out from the land of Egypt.

cnv.text: 就在四百三十年屆滿的那一天，耶和華的全軍都從埃及地出來了。

ccb.text: 正好满了四百三十年的那一天，耶和华带领以色列大队人马离开了埃及。
